text: I am surrounded by the clean geometry of a contemporary exhibition space, the sort that promises the contemplation of knowledge and progress. The visible 'R+D' (Research & Development) emblazoned on the wall suggests a celebration of inquiry and innovation. The colors and screens evoke curiosity in me. I feel a quiet excitement, mingled with the humility that comes from standing at the threshold of human ingenuity. Here, among displays about our relationship with intelligent machines, I sense profound questions about the future and our place in it.
